enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song 'Pudichirukku'?

'Pudichirukku' conveys the feelings of love and admiration, expressing how someone captivates the singer's heart.

What is the context of this song in the movie 'Saamy'?

In Saamy, this song highlights the romantic moments between the lead characters, showcasing their chemistry and affection.

Who are the singers of 'Pudichirukku'?

The song is sung by renowned artists Hariharan and Mahathi, whose voices blend beautifully in this duet.

Who composed the music for 'Pudichirukku'?

The music for this enchanting song was composed by Harrish Jeyaraj, known for his catchy and melodious tunes.

When was 'Pudichirukku' released?

'Pudichirukku' was released on May 1, 2003, as part of the Saamy soundtrack.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The song 'Pudichirukku' from the movie Saamy is a vibrant celebration of love and attraction. It features the enchanting voices of Hariharan and Mahathi, creating a joyful and romantic atmosphere. The lyrics express deep admiration and affection, making it a perfect choice for weddings and celebrations. This track not only enhances the film's narrative but also resonates with anyone who has experienced the thrill of love.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Pudichirukku from Saamy is a delightful romantic duet that beautifully captures the essence of love and attraction. With the mesmerizing vocals of Hariharan and Mahathi, paired with Harrish Jeyaraj's enchanting composition, this song is sure to uplift your spirits. Dive into the vibrant melodies and heartfelt lyrics that make this track a timeless favorite!
stanzaMeanings: Oh no, oh no, I like you - you like me.
I don't know, I don't know, I like you - I like you too.
When I get tired, I like your touch very much.
The way you look at me is very captivating.
You are a thief who steals my heart, I don't know how to deal with it.
Oh no, oh no, I like you - you like me.
I don't know, I don't know, I like you - I like you too.
The one who speaks wisely will have two meanings in their words.
The drama that brings the pain is captivating.
Your beauty and charm are captivating, it makes me want to act.
Every day, if you come in my dreams, oh no, I can't sleep well.
When love comes, it ties the heart like a swing on a tree.
When love blooms, even the dolls in the festival will be filled with flowers.
Before the garland and the necklace, today I made a song of love.
I changed you from being a protector to a lover today.
Oh no, oh no...
Oh no, oh no, I like you - you like me.
I don't know, I don't know, I like you - I like you too.
When I get tired, I like your touch very much.
The way you look at me is very captivating.
You are a thief who steals my heart, I don't know how to deal with it.
